globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; frame-src https://challenges.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
